center.name: 中阿特拉斯山脈
center.summary: 中阿特拉斯山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Atlas wheatear，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Atlas wheatear has a disjunct breeding range in northwestern Africa: in north-eastern Morocco where it breeds in the Rif, the Middle Atlas, the High Atlas and central Anti Atlas mountains with another population in north-eastern Algeria in the Aurès Mountains and in the Djurdjura Range

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Atlas wheatear has a disjunct breeding range in northwestern Africa: in north-eastern Morocco where it breeds in the Rif, the Middle Atlas, the High Atlas and central Anti Atlas mountains with another population in north-eastern Algeria in the Aurès Mountains and in the Djurdjura Range
